steps.title: Write the path area
steps.content:
The outer rectangle adds $x$ feet on all four sides, so its dimensions are $21+2x$ by $11+2x$. The path area is outer area minus pool area.
$$(21+2x)(11+2x)-231=144$$

steps.title: Use the positive width
steps.content: The possible values are $x=-18$ and $x=2$, but a width must be positive. Thus $x=2$, which matches choice A. The answer is A.
